metadata.title: Sneaky Mid Control to Secure a Quick 2v1 on VALORANT’s Split
metadata.description:
Watch how positioning and timing come together for a clean 2v1 clutch on Split. Smooth peeks and sharp shots make all the difference here.
What’s your favorite mid control strategy?

Drop your best clutch moment in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #clutch #fps
